patterns.command_pattern: Commands are defined as enum variants under the Command enum using clap's derive macros
patterns.dispatch_pattern: Command dispatch happens in main() using a match statement on cli.cmd
patterns.clap_usage: Uses clap v4 with derive feature for CLI argument parsing

existing_implementations.description: GenerateCompletion command already exists (line 151-154 in main.rs) that generates shell completions using clap_complete. The task is to rename it to 'Completions' for a simpler command name.
existing_implementations.dependencies_present: clap_complete = "4" is already in Cargo.toml workspace dependencies
